LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT WELL FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF COMPLAINT - DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE PARAGRAPHS 21-26 IS DENIED. THE QUESTION OF WHETHER THE CLAIMS ARE TIME BARRED RELIES ON A QUESTION OF FACT AS TO WHEN THE BANK STATEMENTS WERE AVAILABLE WHICH IS NOT PROPERLY DETERMINED AT THIS PLEADING STAGE OF THE CASE. THE MOTION TO STRIKE PARAGRAPHS 27-44 IS ALSO DENIED. WHETHER OR NOT PLAINTIFF SHOULD HAVE REASONABLY DISCOVERED THE UNAUTHORIZED PAYMENTS IS A QUESTION OF FACT NOT TO BE DETERMINED AT THE STAGE IN THE PROCEEDINGS. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT WELL FARGO BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 5TH AND 6TH CAUSES OF ACTION ON THE GROUND OF DEFECTIVE PLEADING (COMBINING PLAINTIFFS) IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER ON THE GROUNDS THAT THE CLAIMS ARE TIME BARRED IS OVERRULED AS NOT APPROPRIATE FOR DETERMINATION AT THE PLEADING STAGE. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION (NEGLIGENCE) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS RE: OBJECTIVE INDICIA FROM WHICH THE BANK COULD REASONABLY CONCLUDE THAT THE PARTY PRESENTING THE CHECK IS NOT AUTHORIZED TO TRANSACT IN MANNER PROPOSED. (MOVING PARTY MAY PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER OR PLAINTIFF MAY INCORPORATE THIS RULING IN PROPOSED ORDER ON COMPANION DEMURRER.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2014 Off Calendar

Mtn For Default Prove-Up; Summary
Off Calendar Mar-20-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Michellle Akerman, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, ATHLONE DEVELOPMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, McGALKEA, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, BYRNES & McCLELLAN CONSTRUCTION, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION and DENIS McMAHON, AN INDIVIDUAL.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) EDISON MALO, AN INDIVIDUAL.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Enda Keane sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Plaintiffs' shall have Judgment in the amount of $210,550.97 against Malo, representing the total amount Malo stole from Plaintiffs' bank accounts, plus interst and costs, less $72,500 received pursuant to the settlements with the non-defaulting parties, as follows:
$213,170.170.17 Total amount due to Plaintiffs as a result of Malos's theft from Plaintiffs' bank accounts.
$69,320.80 Prejudgment interest.
$560.00 Costs.
$75,365.00 Attorneys' fees.
Total amount of Judgment: $285,915.97
Counsel to submit modified judgment with the changes read into the record by the court.

DEMURRER
Off Calendar May-24-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT WELL FARGO BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 5TH AND 6TH CAUSES OF ACTION ON THE GROUND OF DEFECTIVE PLEADING (COMBINING PLAINTIFFS) IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER ON THE GROUNDS THAT THE CLAIMS ARE TIME BARRED IS OVERRULED AS NOT APPROPRIATE FOR DETERMINATION AT THE PLEADING STAGE.
DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION (NEGLIGENCE) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS RE: OBJECTIVE INDICIA FROM WHICH THE BANK COULD REASONABLY CONCLUDE THAT THE PARTY PRESENTING THE CHECK IS NOT AUTHORIZED TO TRANSACT IN MANNER PROPOSED. (Moving party may prepare a proposed form of order or plaintiff may incorporate this ruling in proposed order on companion demurrer.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-24-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT WELL FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF COMPLAINT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE PARAGRAPHS 21-26 IS DENIED. THE QUESTION OF WHETHER THE CLAIMS ARE TIME BARRED RELIES ON A QUESTION OF FACT AS TO WHEN THE BANK STATEMENTS WERE AVAILABLE WHICH IS NOT PROPERLY DETERMINED AT THIS PLEADING STAGE OF THE CASE. THE MOTION TO STRIKE PARAGRAPHS 27-44 IS ALSO DENIED. WHETHER OR NOT PLAINTIFF SHOULD HAVE REASONABLY DISCOVERED THE UNAUTHORIZED PAYMENTS IS A QUESTION OF FACT NOT TO BE DETERMINED AT THE STAGE IN THE PROCEEDINGS. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
